MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Brian Hilliard, Esq. for Plaintiff; appearance by Jonathan Fil, Esq. for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-14-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610); After hearing, Order Dismissing Complaint filed NOV-26-2013; matter taken off calendar in Dept. 610 (written order continuing Order to Show Cause not issued).

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained, with 10 days leave to amend to state a cause of action against defendant if plaintiff can do so in good faith. No opposition filed. (Order signed after hearing.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
